ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighbourhood the customer belongs to */,
  "student_discount" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is eligible for a student discount */,
  "loyalty_card" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a loyalty card */,
  "hair_dye" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has had a hair dye service */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* General location of the neighbourhood */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the appointment */,
  "scheduled_day" TEXT /* The day the appointment was scheduled for */,
  "appointment_day" TEXT /* The day the appointment is supposed to happen */,
  "time_between_scheduled_appointment" INTEGER /* Time difference between scheduled day and appointment day */,
  "weekday_appointment_day" TEXT /* The day of the week the appointment is on */,
  "no_show" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer did not show up for the appointment */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service offered in the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g. pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beauty_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beauty package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the beauty package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the package in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discount_offers" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount offer */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount offer */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of discount offer (e.g. percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_packages" (
  "appointment_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the appointment-package link */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appointment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beauty package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES beauty_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_packages_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sms_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMS reminder */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appointment for which the reminder is sent */,
  "sms_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the SMS was sent */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the SMS was sent */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g. appointment, promotional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_reminders_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points accumulated */,
  "last_reward_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reward was redeemed */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_appointments" (
  "staff_appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the staff-appointment link */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_appointments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_appointments_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback record */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appointment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer's rating (e.g. 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer's comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the staff member */,
  "appointments_completed" INTEGER /* Number of appointments completed by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_performance_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
